subcodes.title: Words spoken ca. 1911 in London
subcodes.first_line: To know the Truth, to have attained knowledge, is good, but it is only the first step, it is not enough. The only thing that avails for the soul's growth, is to live the truth.
subcodes.subjects: @words vs deeds, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @knowledge; recognition of God, @spiritual transformation
